title: Kilner Diamond Drinks Dispenser 5 Litre Glass Beverage Server with Stainless Steel Tap, Airtight Clip-Top Lid & Silicone Seal, Ideal for Juices, Cocktails & Infused Drinks
features: PERFECT FOR SERVING | The Kilner Diamond Drinks Dispenser is ideal for serving a variety of beverages, including fruit juices, cocktails, and infused drinks—perfect for home gatherings and parties.
GENEROUS 5L CAPACITY | With ample space for ice, this dispenser keeps refreshments cool and fresh for longer, making it a stylish and practical addition to any event.
LEAKPROOF STAINLESS STEEL TAP | The high-quality stainless steel tap ensures a smooth, drip-free pour and is easily removable for effortless cleaning.
AIRTIGHT CLIP-TOP SEAL | The innovative silicone seal design maintains freshness while allowing smooth liquid flow, keeping the lid securely closed at all times.
SUSTAINABLE & BPA-FREE | Made from durable, high-quality sodalime glass, this dispenser is free from harmful chemicals, odor-resistant, and designed for reuse, refill, and recycle.

THE KILNER STORY | With over 180 years of heritage, Kilner jars are trusted worldwide for their quality and innovation. The iconic brand offers simple solutions for food storage, preparation, and sustainable living.
